ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Rolls Royce) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Camargue) */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of vehicle */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the vehicle */,
  "spare_parts_cost" REAL /* Cost of spare parts associated with the vehicle */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Labor cost for maintenance or repairs */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was purchased */,
  "vehicle_age" REAL /* Calculated age of the vehicle in years */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Unique chassis number for each vehicle */,
  "engine_number" TEXT /* Unique engine number for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., petrol, diesel) */,
  "interior_color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interior color of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance service */,
  "next_maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in stock, sold, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_interior_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("interior_color_id") REFERENCES interior_colors ("interior_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle color (e.g., Black, White) */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Saloon, Coupe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance service */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "spare_parts_used" TEXT /* JSON array of spare parts used in the maintenance */,
  "service_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance service in hours */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, major repair) */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spare_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spare part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the spare part */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the spare part */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the spare part */,
  "part_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spare part */,
  "part_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the spare part */,
  "part_warranty" TEXT /* Warranty period for the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle at the time of sale (e.g., new, used) */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period provided with the sale */,
  "salesman_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_preferences" TEXT /* JSON array of customer preferences (e.g., preferred contact method, preferred vehicle type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, mechanic, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales, mechanic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles added or removed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inventory change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_parts" (
  "supplier_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-part association */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the part */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spare part */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of spare parts in stock */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_parts_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES spare_parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from sales */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the vehicles sold */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the sales period */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of the vehicles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interior_colors" (
  "interior_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interior color */,
  "interior_color_name" TEXT /* Name of the interior color */,
  "interior_hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the interior color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interior_color_id")
)
